extraction.one_line_summary: ULISSI Diego infiltrated GC group sprint after SAGAN Peter's double-climb strategy failed by 15 seconds, ALMEIDA João gained bonus seconds in second
tactical_patterns: SAGAN Peter's pre-stage pressure via BODNAR Maciej forcing tempo on penultimate climb isolated DÉMARE Arnaud only temporarily
Deceuninck Quick-Step using MASNADA Fausto and KNOX James to pace GC group extended gap to SAGAN bridging group final 15km
ULISSI Diego infiltrating GC group after climbs avoided energy-sapping bridge effort while retaining sprint speed versus pure climbers
ALMEIDA João targeting intermediate sprint bonus seconds day before TT reveals confident time trial form anticipation

rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: dropped on Muro di Calaone with SWIFT Ben, bridging effort to 15 seconds shows vulnerability on steep pitches
rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: positive: re-caught GC group with 20km remaining after being distanced on Roccolo shows exceptional diesel recovery
rider_signals.ULISSI Diego: positive: second stage win by infiltrating climber sprint shows tactical opportunism and preserved fast-twitch after selective climbs
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: second place finish targeting bonus seconds day before TT reveals confidence in extending GC lead
rider_signals.BALLERINI Davide: negative: sat on SAGAN/SWIFT bridge without contributing then didn't contest sprint shows confused race execution
rider_signals.MASNADA Fausto: positive: pacing GC group final kilometers to distance SAGAN shows domestique value beyond mountain stages
rider_signals.KNOX James: positive: sharing pace with MASNADA to control GC group reveals expanded role beyond mountain support
